suites.description: Verify the live platform API gateway health and public discovery path through /healthz and /openapi.json.
suites.notes: Kept rollback-safe and authentication-independent so the smoke path stays usable even when role mapping changes.

suites.description: Verify the live Windmill operator path by resolving the production endpoint from the service catalog and reading /api/version.
suites.notes: Kept intentionally small so Windmill verification stays rollback-safe and suitable for seeded live apply checks.
